case_title: BENTALEB, LARBI VS CUNNINGS, TOM et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BENTALEB, LARBI AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGS, TOM CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CUNNINGS, TOM
PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR SELECTED PARTY, DEFT.TOM CUNNINGS, WHO WAS PERSONALLY SERVED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-08-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-05-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR MUNI BUS DRIVER TO APPEAR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENTALEB, LARBI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUNNINGS, TOM CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00, JUDGEMENT IS SEVERAL: $2500 IS AGAINST TOM CUNNINGS AND $2,500 IS AGAINST CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRNCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

JUDGMENT IS FULLY SATISFIED AS TO CO-DEFENDANT TOM CUNNINGS.
